description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a rich walnut finish, featuring three open shelves and a solid base section. The front face displays the open shelves, ideal for storing books, decor, or other items, while the lower section appears to be a closed compartment, possibly a drawer or cabinet. The sides and back are solid wood panels, providing structural support and a clean, minimalist appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and elegant look. There are no visible handles or glass panels, and the overall design is simple and functional. This unit is suitable for placement in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, walnut-finished wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a solid lower compartment. Its minimalist design features visible wood grain and no handles or glass panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and a solid lower compartment.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the shelves and base.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid wood panel.
